candidates.rationale: Small line-field cases have direct closed-form references and are the safest first qualification candidates.
candidates.primary_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved the retained release evidence against the graduation gate
evidence_gaps: none for the current 1D closed-form qualification scope
candidates.graduation_gate: analytic reference, tolerance provenance, and CI artifact must all be present before qualification

candidates.rationale: Classic beam, torsion, and frame cases are central to engineering trust and have textbook references.
candidates.primary_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved the retained structural validation bundle against the graduation gate
evidence_gaps: none for the current beam-frame-classic qualification scope
required_artifacts: documented force and moment sign convention
candidates.graduation_gate: two independent canonical cases must pass with documented tolerances

candidates.rationale: 2D thermal and thermoelastic patches are needed before material heat-spreader claims can mature.
candidates.primary_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved the retained thermal plane validation bundle against the graduation gate
evidence_gaps: none for the current thermal-plane-patch qualification scope
candidates.graduation_gate: mesh and boundary evidence must be linked from the operator reliability entry

candidates.rationale: Plane electromagnetic patches are important for dielectric and magnetic material screening.
candidates.primary_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved the retained electromagnetic plane validation bundle against the graduation gate
evidence_gaps: none for the current electromagnetic-plane-patch qualification scope
candidates.graduation_gate: field, flux, and stored-energy checks must pass across at least two orientations

candidates.rationale: Modal workflows need convergence and mode-order evidence before serious vibration claims.
candidates.primary_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved the retained modal frame validation bundle against the graduation gate
evidence_gaps: none for the current modal-frame-sanity qualification scope
candidates.graduation_gate: mode frequencies and ordering must remain stable under documented refinement

candidates.rationale: The Stokes operators are intentionally screening-grade; their quad and triangle fixtures now have explicit scope, boundary, tolerance, and mesh-refinement evidence for the screening boundary.
candidates.primary_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved the retained Stokes screening boundary bundle against the convergence gate
evidence_gaps: none for the current Stokes screening-boundary qualification scope
required_artifacts: triangle geometry and heterogeneous material regression
candidates.graduation_gate: Stokes-only screening scope must be backed by retained convergence or external-reference evidence before qualification

candidates.rationale: The 1D acoustic bar has a compact scalar closed form and is a good first acoustic qualification boundary.
candidates.primary_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved the retained acoustic closed-form validation bundle against the graduation gate
evidence_gaps: none for the current acoustic-bar closed-form qualification scope
candidates.graduation_gate: scalar closed-form response, frequency scaling, and damping-loss evidence must be retained before qualification

candidates.rationale: The 1D advection-diffusion bar has direct flux and Peclet closed forms for constant-coefficient steady transport.
candidates.primary_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved the retained transport closed-form validation bundle against the graduation gate
evidence_gaps: none for the current 1D steady transport qualification scope
candidates.graduation_gate: closed-form flux, Peclet scaling, and zero-velocity limit evidence must be retained before qualification

candidates.rationale: The 1D magnetostatic bar has a scalar permeance closed form and completes the electromagnetic line-field qualification boundary.
candidates.primary_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved the retained magnetostatic bar validation bundle against the graduation gate
evidence_gaps: none for the current magnetostatic-bar closed-form qualification scope
candidates.graduation_gate: scalar permeance, material scaling, and zero-source energy evidence must be retained before qualification

candidates.rationale: The 1D linear spring chain has a direct series-equivalent closed form and is the safest next structural review promotion.
candidates.primary_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved the retained spring 1D validation bundle against the graduation gate
evidence_gaps: none for the current spring-1d closed-form qualification scope
candidates.graduation_gate: series stiffness, member force continuity, and zero-load energy evidence must be retained before qualification

candidates.rationale: The 2D and 3D linear spring operators share the same vector spring projection contract and have compact orthogonal closed-form fixtures.
candidates.primary_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved the retained vector spring validation bundle against the graduation gate
evidence_gaps: none for the current spring-vector closed-form qualification scope
candidates.graduation_gate: orthogonal vector stiffness, fixed-support displacement, member force, and strain-energy evidence must be retained before qualification

candidates.rationale: The 1D thermal beam has a compact free-curvature closed form and is the safest thermal-structural review promotion after line and spring operators.
candidates.primary_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved the retained thermal beam validation bundle against the graduation gate
evidence_gaps: none for the current thermal-beam-1d closed-form qualification scope
candidates.graduation_gate: free thermal curvature, fixed-root response, zero-gradient limit, and near-zero internal-force evidence must be retained before qualification

candidates.rationale: The 1D penalty stop contact operator has compact inactive and active branch closed forms for the retained single-contact fixture.
candidates.primary_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved the retained contact-gap validation bundle against the graduation gate
evidence_gaps: none for the current contact-gap-1d closed-form qualification scope
required_artifacts: inactive and active branch derivation note
candidates.graduation_gate: inactive gap, active penalty stop, penetration, and force-split equilibrium evidence must be retained before qualification

candidates.rationale: The 2D truss operator has a compact symmetric two-bar closed form for axial force, apex displacement, and strain energy.
candidates.primary_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved the retained 2D truss validation bundle against the graduation gate
evidence_gaps: none for the current truss-2d closed-form qualification scope
candidates.graduation_gate: symmetric two-bar force balance, displacement, stress, strain, and energy evidence must be retained before qualification

candidates.rationale: The 3D truss operator has a compact symmetric tripod closed form for axial force, apex displacement, and strain energy.
candidates.primary_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved the retained 3D truss validation bundle against the graduation gate
evidence_gaps: none for the current truss-3d closed-form qualification scope
candidates.graduation_gate: symmetric tripod force balance, displacement, stress, strain, and energy evidence must be retained before qualification

candidates.rationale: The 3D thermal truss operator has a compact fully restrained uniform-temperature closed form for strain split, stress, axial force, and energy.
candidates.primary_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved the retained 3D thermal truss validation bundle against the graduation gate
evidence_gaps: none for the current thermal-truss-3d closed-form qualification scope
candidates.graduation_gate: restrained uniform-temperature strain split, stress, axial force, and energy evidence must be retained before qualification

candidates.rationale: The 2D thermal truss operator has the same fully restrained uniform-temperature closed form as the 3D thermal truss lane.
candidates.primary_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved the retained 2D thermal truss validation bundle against the graduation gate
evidence_gaps: none for the current thermal-truss-2d closed-form qualification scope
candidates.graduation_gate: restrained uniform-temperature 2D strain split, stress, axial force, and energy evidence must be retained before qualification

candidates.rationale: The 2D thermal frame operator has a compact fully restrained uniform-temperature single-member closed form for axial force, stress, and energy.
candidates.primary_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved the retained 2D thermal frame validation bundle against the graduation gate
evidence_gaps: none for the current thermal-frame-2d closed-form qualification scope
candidates.graduation_gate: restrained uniform-temperature 2D frame strain split, axial force, stress, zero-gradient, and energy evidence must be retained before qualification

candidates.rationale: The 3D thermal frame operator has a compact fully restrained single-member closed form for uniform temperature, thermal curvature, bending moment, combined stress, and energy.
candidates.primary_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved the retained 3D thermal frame validation bundle against the graduation gate
evidence_gaps: none for the current thermal-frame-3d closed-form qualification scope
candidates.graduation_gate: restrained 3D frame strain split, thermal curvature, moment, combined stress, and energy evidence must be retained before qualification
